name: Do I need witnesses for an AEO malpractice case?
description: Helpful, not essential; experts key.[9] Prioritize docs.

mainEntity.name: Do I need witnesses for an AEO malpractice case?

acceptedAnswer.text: Helpful, not essential; experts key.[9] Prioritize docs.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Witnesses strengthen but aren't required; expert testimony on standards often suffices for AEO negligence.** Documents primary.[1][9]

Experts compare to peers.[9] Nationwide.

**Key factors:**
- Marketing consultant.
- Former agency staff.
- Client lead data.
- AI tool reps (rare).

Line up early; depositions costly. Focus on hard metrics first.
